parsed.recommendation_text: For a budget-conscious user who values quality but is sensitive to price, the Sony WH-CH710N offers an excellent balance. It provides good noise cancellation and impressive battery life at $198, making it more affordable than premium options while still offering solid performance. The JBL Tune 750NC BT and Edifier W82BT are also strong contenders but lack the brand recognition and codec support of Sony's model.
parsed.selection_rationale: Offers good value with Sony's reliability.
